sql_queries.user_role:
SELECT rol_id
FROM rol
WHERE cliente_id = :cid AND codigo_rol = 'USER_TENANT' AND es_activo = 1
sql_queries.rp_count:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.codigo) AS c
FROM rol_permiso rp
INNER JOIN permiso p ON p.permiso_id = rp.permiso_id AND p.es_activo = 1
WHERE rp.cliente_id = :cid
  AND rp.rol_id = :rid
  AND p.codigo IN (:pc0, :pc1, :pc2, :pc3, :pc4, :pc5, :pc6, :pc7, :pc8, :pc9, :pc10, :pc11, :pc12, :pc13, :pc14, :pc15)
sql_queries.rmp_ver_count:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS c
FROM rol_menu_permiso
WHERE cliente_id = :cid
  AND rol_id = :rid
  AND puede_ver = 1
